title: arabis pubescens subsp. leucanthemifolia
intro: Arabis pubescens subsp. leucanthemifolia, also known as alpine rockcress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the high-altitude mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Arabis pubescens subsp. leucanthemifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
